title: Junior Revenue Manager at Speciality Restaurants Global Group

jsonLd.title: Junior Revenue Manager at Speciality Restaurants Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Speciality Restaurants Global Group is actively seeking a talented and motivated Revenue Manager to join our dynamic team in Kolkata. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Speciality Restaurants Global Group:
Speciality Restaurants Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Yield Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Speciality Restaurants Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
